description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a duck with a streamlined, elongated body and a slightly upturned tail. The head is rounded with a flat, broad bill, and the eyes are positioned on the sides of the head. The plumage is predominantly brownish-gray with subtle lighter and darker patches, and the underside is paler. The wings are tucked closely to the body, and the feet are not visible, suggesting they are either tucked underneath or not modeled. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, resembling the texture of real duck feathers. The overall form and coloration suggest a wild duck species commonly found in urban parks or near water bodies.
description: A lifelike brownish-gray duck with a rounded head, flat bill, and streamlined body, featuring subtle feather textures and natural coloration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the duck, highlighting the streamlined body and flat bill.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the rounded back and tail, with the head barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the duck's body and bill.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the head and bill, with the body tapering away from the viewer.
